The '''Battle of M2934738''' occurred in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]. It was the result of an ambush staged by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Delak Krennel]] against a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] supply convoy en route to [[Liinade III]]. As a gesture of good faith, Krennel rescued the New Republic survivors and offered them parole on condition they never again take up arms for the New Republic.
